audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a high-pitched, angry tone, with a noticeable pause between phrases.
temporal_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands in front of a monitor displaying a surveillance feed, gesturing with his hand while speaking. He is positioned in a room with glass walls and fluorescent lighting, with other individuals seated around a table in the background. The monitor shows a dimly lit corridor with a timestamp visible. Another man in a similar uniform sits nearby, looking toward the speaker, while others are seated at the table, some writing or looking at papers. The room appears to be a security or command center with multiple workstations and monitors.
